overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rural industrial waterfront area at dawn. The character moves from railway tracks past a water tower and red warehouse onto a weathered wooden dock, observing the calm water with oil pollution and eventually approaching a wooden shelter where an NPC stands.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the railway tracks toward the waterfront, passing telegraph poles and grassy embankments

notable_agents.action: man in green coat walking across the railway tracks from left to right

entered.detail: large red wooden industrial building with white trim and multiple windows
tall cylindrical water tank elevated on wooden support beams
metal railway tracks running parallel to the walking direction
wooden utility poles with crossbars and wires running alongside the tracks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a rural industrial area at dawn. The camera moves along railway tracks with a large red warehouse on the left and a wooden water tower on the right. A man in a green coat crosses the tracks ahead as the character walks forward through the grassy terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock entrance at railway terminus

events.description: character steps off the dirt ground onto the wooden planks of the waterfront dock

agents.ego_description: turning left from the railway tracks and stepping onto the wooden dock structure, moving toward the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the walking surface of the pier
vertical wooden posts supporting the dock structure
still water surface reflecting the cloudy morning sky

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the railway area onto a wooden dock. The red warehouse and tracks fall behind as the camera moves onto the weathered planks. Wooden pilings appear along the right side as the dock extends over the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered wooden pier over polluted water

events.description: camera pans down to reveal rainbow oil slick on water surface indicating industrial pollution

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock while observing the water and surrounding structures, occasionally panning to view the polluted areas

notable_agents.action: group of figures standing on a parallel dock structure in the distance

entered.detail: water surface contaminated with rainbow-colored oil sheen and debris
thick ropes tied between wooden posts serving as safety railings
small wooden structure on pilings visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along the wooden dock, passing rope railings and weathered pilings. The camera pans to reveal polluted water with a rainbow oil slick between the dock sections. In the distance, figures stand on a parallel pier structure, and a small boathouse is visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden shelter at dock terminus

events.description: approaching the wooden shelter where an NPC stands near the entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the wooden shelter at the end of the dock, passing supply crates and barrels

notable_agents.action: man in hat and coat standing beside the shelter looking out at the water

entered.detail: open-sided wooden shed with gabled roof and support beams at the dock's end
stacked wooden supply boxes and barrels on the dock platform

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a wooden shelter at the dock's terminus. The polluted water area falls behind as the character moves toward the covered structure. An NPC in a hat stands to the left near the shelter entrance. Wooden crates and supply barrels are scattered on the deck around the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rural industrial railway area toward the terminus of a weathered wooden dock at dawn. It begins by moving along railway tracks between a large red warehouse and a wooden water tower, following a man in a green coat crossing the path through the grassy terrain. As the character advances, the railway area falls behind and the scene transitions onto weathered wooden planks that extend over the calm water. The camera then proceeds past rope railings and pilings to reveal a rainbow oil slick polluting the water, with distant figures and a boathouse visible across the surface. Finally, the view shifts away from the water as the character approaches a wooden shelter surrounded by crates and barrels, where an NPC in a hat stands waiting.
